title: AI column blank when column is blank

posts.author: Moeydc (Jon Moses)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi MC

Does anyone know the trick to using the AI feature and having it remain blank when there is nothing in the variable cell?

At the moment I start the custom script with ’ If {Variable} is blank this cell is blank’ but it only seems to work sometimes?

The workflow is I have a cell that is a broad information dump cell for client information, Name address Phone etc, then the ai fill fills out each cell for -Salutation, First name, Middle Name, Last name, Street address, Suburb, State, postcode etc.

It works great but when the dump cells are empty I need to go and manually clear out the error in each cell.
